title: Test: Add API error handling tests
original_text: Added tests for API error handling scenarios. Created test cases for 400, 401, 403, 404, 500 status codes. Tests verify that the client properly retries on transient errors and displays appropriate error messages to users. Added tests for rate limiting behavior and timeout handling. Updated tests/test_api_client.py. Result: 35 tests pass.
expected_subject: test(api): add error handling and retry logic tests
expected_body_lines: - Verify retry logic for transient errors
expected_command: git commit -m "test(api): add error handling and retry logic tests"
